case_title: KIM CHUA VS. THOMAS HESTER et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-09-2003 IN DEPT. 501 - PLAINTFF AND DEFT. HESTER APPEARED AND AGREED TO JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT GARCIN DID NOT APPEAR AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED AFTER PROVE UP. HONORABLE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTING BY ERIC THRONE, CSR #7855 (GPS)
